The '''''Daring''''' was a frigate operated by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] in the years following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the ''Daring'' was part of a Alliance task force monitoring [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] fleet units in [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]], along with the Alliance warship [[Bounty (warship)|''Bounty'']].

During a mission near the [[Both system|Bothawui system]], the ''Daring'' successfully engaged a task force of nineteen Bothan frigates, with the aid of the larger ''Bounty'' and several squadrons of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]]. Due to the fact that several of the vessels were on shakedown cruises or not fully crewed, the Alliance forces were able to rout the Bothan flotilla.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice'' abridged audiobook]]
